title: Dynamic padding on contentContainerStyle
message: Your users see rows jump when a changing paddingBottom on contentContainerStyle shifts the whole list.
help: Use `contentInset={{ bottom: dynamicValue }}` so the OS shifts the content instead of relaying it out, which avoids the jump.
